title: HQ1: improve portfolio insight confidence legend semantics
problem: Users can misinterpret confidence levels in insight cards when label semantics are implicit.
evidence: UX observation: confidence labels are interpreted inconsistently
Benchmark: leading fintech apps use explicit confidence legends
proposed_change: Introduce explicit confidence legend semantics and concise explanation text in portfolio insight card.
expected_benefit: Higher trust and faster interpretation of insight outputs.
success_metrics: Users can explain confidence meaning in one pass
kpi_target: Decrease insight interpretation confusion rate by >=25% in manual QA checklist.
benchmark_delta: Current card lacks explicit semantics; target parity with benchmark confidence legend clarity pattern.
rollback_plan: Revert confidence legend semantics patch only.
